channel.title: Performance Benchmark on DuckDB 实验室
channel.description: Recent content in Performance Benchmark on DuckDB 实验室

item.title: DuckDB vs Pandas for 10GB Data Processing: Benchmark & Practical Guide
item.description: A comprehensive benchmark comparing DuckDB and Pandas for processing 10GB datasets. Real code, memory usage measurements, speed comparisons, and practical advice for choosing the right tool.
